title: View Current Lane Zone Configuration on the Zone Config Aveva API Page
summary: Use the Zone Config Aveva API page and its Get Zone Configuration function to view the current configuration of all lanes, including lane assignments, respective zones, and processing sequence numbers.
when_to_use: Use when you need visibility into the current lane configuration in the system and need to review lane assignments, zones, and processing sequence numbers using the Zone Config Aveva API page.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to update or modify zone settings; the source mentions Update Zone Configuration exists, but this procedure only covers viewing current configuration.
Do not use this runbook to infer a navigation path to the page; the source does not provide the menu path or exact navigation sequence.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open the Zone Config Aveva API page, use Get Zone Configuration, and review the returned lane configuration information.

safety_notes: This source describes a view/inspection activity and does not describe physical intervention.
Do not perform configuration changes as part of this procedure; this runbook is limited to viewing current configuration.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Zone Config Aveva API page

access_required: Access to the Zone Config Aveva API page
system_preconditions: The Zone Config Aveva API page is available for viewing.
The Get Zone Configuration function is available on the page.

visual_references.description: Training slide showing the Zone Config Aveva API page layout and describing lane assignments, zones, processing sequence numbers, and the Get Zone Configuration function.

steps.failure_condition: The page cannot be opened or the expected Zone Config Aveva API page is not displayed.

steps.title: Run Get Zone Configuration
steps.purpose: Fetch the current configuration of all lanes from the Zone Config Aveva API page.
steps.instruction: Use the Get Zone Configuration function to fetch the current configuration of all lanes.
steps.expected_result: The system returns the current configuration of all lanes.
steps.healthy_condition: Get Zone Configuration returns lane configuration data for all lanes.
steps.failure_condition: Get Zone Configuration does not return the current configuration of all lanes.
